Specialization of RN. ICU/CCU focus. Adds explicit exception: → CRNA.

notes: Management track. Promoted from patrol. Parallel to detective track.

Broker license upgrade from agent. Additional state broker exam + ~2yr experience as agent required. Can operate independently or manage other agents.

Technical sales track. Explains and sells complex technical products. Typically lateral entry from an engineering or technical field rather than internal promotion from sales reps. High resilience due to domain expertise requirement.

notes: Entry point. No degree required. Bookkeeping certificate or associate's common.

Core mid-level. CPA credential accelerates advancement. Requires bachelor's.

Wealth/planning specialization. CFP credential preferred. Series 65/66 common.

Consumer credit branch. Nonprofit sector common. NFCC certification available.

Senior regulatory/compliance role. Federal/state agency or bank examiner. Highest resilience in cluster.

occupation: Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists
notes: Entry point. Data-driven marketing research. Bachelor's typical. Shared with analysts cluster.
Specialized entry. Advertising/media sales. Commission-based. Cross-family lateral to marketing cluster (Search Marketing Strategist).
Core digital role. Google Ads + Analytics certs. Natural progression from market research.
PR/comms specialization branch. Bachelor's in PR or comms typical. Media relations focus.
Content specialization branch. Freelance or in-house. Portfolio-driven. Low barrier but competitive.

Campaign leadership. Broadens from digital to full media mix. Often from search marketing track.
